tool_args: SELECT station_id, name, island, elevation_m, COUNT(*), SUM(rainfall_mm), AVG(rainfall_mm), est_annual FROM mv_daily_station_summary JOIN mesonet_stations HAVING COUNT(*)>365 ORDER BY AVG(rainfall_mm) ASC LIMIT 10
tool_result_summary: Kawaihae (Big Island, 113m) is driest at 0.97 mm/day, est 353 mm/yr. Top 10 are all leeward stations.
